sections.title: Our Story
sections.content:
Founded in 2010 by Chef Maria Santos, Coastal Cafe began as a small beachside shack serving the freshest catches of the day. Over the years, we've grown into a beloved destination for seafood lovers from around the world.

Our commitment to sustainability means we work exclusively with local fishermen who practice responsible fishing. Every dish tells a story of the sea, prepared with passion and served with love.

items.quote: The best seafood I've ever had. The ocean view made it even more magical.
items.author: Sarah M., Food Blogger

items.quote: A hidden gem! The lobster bisque is absolutely divine.

items.quote: Perfect spot for special occasions. The service was impeccable.
